description: Create three search macros in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) to standardize common SOC investigation queries. The macro `auth_failures_by_ip(1)` must take one argument, search the `security_logs` index for failed authentication events, and compute the count of failures for the provided IP. The macro `top_attackers(1)` must take one argument, search the `security_logs` index for failed authentication events, and return the top N source IPs. The macro `event_volume_trend` must take zero arguments and produce a time-series chart using the `timechart` command querying at least two of the following indexes: `security_logs`, `web_logs`, or `system_logs`. Ensure all macros are saved and enabled.
